description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a richly textured cover in deep blue, bordered and cornered with worn brown leather. The front cover features a large, ornate gold fleur-de-lis emblem, which is slightly weathered, giving the book an antique or medieval appearance. The spine is reinforced with brown leather and decorated with gold horizontal lines and faint text, adding to its vintage charm. The pages are visibly aged, with a yellowed, slightly rough edge, suggesting the book is old or well-used. The corners and edges of the cover show signs of wear, with gold accents at the corners for added durability and decoration. The overall design is elegant and regal, making it stand out as a special or valuable item, possibly a historical tome or a collector's piece.
description: A thick, antique-style book with a blue cover, brown leather spine and corners, and a large gold fleur-de-lis emblem on the front. The book has visible signs of wear and gold decorative accents.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the front edge, highlighting the gold fleur-de-lis on the blue cover and the brown leather spine with gold accents.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, showing the full gold fleur-de-lis emblem and the marbled blue cover with brown leather corners.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the back edge, displaying the gold fleur-de-lis and the opposite side of the brown leather spine.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the spine, revealing gold horizontal lines and faint text on the brown leather, with the blue cover and gold emblem partially visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, ornate gold fleur-de-lis emblem centered on a marbled blue background. The design is regal and decorative, with no other imagery or artwork present.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown leather with gold horizontal lines and faint, possibly decorative, text running along its length. The style is classic and vintage, matching the overall antique appearance of the book.
